description_long: This street light features a tall, slender metal pole with ornate scrollwork bracing at the upper section, supporting two distinct lamp heads. One lamp head is a classic, downward-facing dome with a wide brim, reminiscent of vintage urban lighting, while the other is a rectangular, boxy fixture mounted horizontally, likely for modern LED illumination. The pole itself is adorned with decorative elements, including finials and patterned bands, giving it a historic and elegant appearance. The base is flared and robust, suggesting a secure ground installation. The overall design blends traditional and contemporary elements, making it suitable for both historic districts and modern cityscapes. The materials appear to be primarily metal, with glass or plastic diffusers in the lamp heads.
description: A tall, ornate metal street light with both a classic dome lamp and a modern box fixture, featuring decorative scrollwork and a sturdy flared base.
description_view_0: Side view showing both the dome-shaped lamp and the rectangular box fixture, with visible scrollwork and decorative pole details.
description_view_1: Narrow end-on view highlighting the thin profile of the pole and the rectangular box fixture, with the dome lamp barely visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing both lamp heads and the ornate pole structure.
description_view_3: End-on view from the side of the dome lamp, showing the circular shape of the dome and the box fixture above.
attribute_lamp_head_design: One lamp head is a classic, downward-facing dome with a wide brim and likely a glass diffuser, while the other is a modern, rectangular box fixture with a flat cover, possibly for LED lighting.
attribute_pole_ornamentation: Decorative scrollwork, patterned bands, and finials.
